RAJEEV KUMAR JOSHI

Senior React Native Developer | Android & iOS Engineer
Bengaluru, India | +91 8792169096 | rajeevjoshi91@gmail.com
LinkedIn | GitHub | Portfolio
Professional Summary
Senior Mobile Engineer with 9+ years of experience in Mobile Application Development, including 5+ years in React Native and 4 years in Native Android Development. Expertise in designing, developing, deploying, and maintaining scalable Android and iOS applications across Fintech, SaaS, Travel, Entertainment, and Consumer Technology domains. Strong hands-on experience with React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript, GraphQL, Redux Toolkit, React Query, Authentication Systems, Payment Integrations, Push Notifications, Deep Linking, Native Module Development, Mobile Security, CI/CD Pipelines, and Release Management. Possess strong understanding of React Native Architecture and Internals, including Hermes Engine, JSI, Fabric Renderer, TurboModules, React Native Bridge Architecture, JavaScript Thread, Shadow Thread, UI Thread, Native Thread Communication, Rendering Pipeline, and Performance Optimization. Successfully delivered 60+ Android and iOS production releases while collaborating with Product Managers, Designers, Backend Engineers, QA Teams, and Business Stakeholders in Agile Scrum environments.
Key Highlights
  • 9+ Years of Mobile Application Development Experience
  • 5+ Years of React Native Development Experience
  • 4 Years of Native Android Development Experience
  • Delivered 60+ Android & iOS Production Releases
  • Proficient in React Native New Architecture
  • End-to-End Mobile Application Ownership
  • Native Module Development Experience
  • Fintech, SaaS, Travel & Consumer Domain Experience
  • Cross-Platform Android & iOS Development
  • Immediate Joiner

  • React Native Architecture

Technical Skills
Mobile Technologies:
React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Expo, React Native CLI
State Management:
Redux Toolkit, React Query, Context API, AsyncStorage
API & Data Layer:
GraphQL, REST APIs, Axios
Android Development:
Java, Android SDK, Android Studio, Activities, Fragments, Android Lifecycle, Play Store Deployment
iOS Development:
Xcode, CocoaPods, App Store Connect, TestFlight, Provisioning Profiles, Certificates & Signing
React Native Architecture:
Hermes, JSI, Fabric Renderer, TurboModules, Native Modules, React Native Bridge Architecture
React Native Internals:
JavaScript Thread, UI Thread, Shadow Thread, Native Thread, Rendering Pipeline, Memory Management, Performance Optimization
Authentication & Security:
OAuth, JWT Authentication, AWS Cognito, Auth0
Payments:
Razorpay, Cashfree
Analytics & Monitoring:
PostHog, Firebase Analytics, Sentry
Deep Linking & Notifications:
Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM), Branch.io, Push Notifications, Deep Linking
Native Integrations:
Camera, Authentication, GPS & Location Services, Device Permissions, File Upload & Download, Payment SDKs
Architecture & Practices:
MVVM, Clean Architecture, SOLID Principles, Design Patterns, Modular Architecture
Testing:
Jest, Unit Testing, Integration Testing, Detox, E2E Testing
Cloud & Backend Services:
Firebase, AWS Cognito, Auth0
DevOps & Release Engineering:
CI/CD Pipelines, Play Store Releases, App Store Releases, Crash Monitoring, Release Automation, Hotfix Management
Tools:
Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, Postman, VS Code, Android Studio, Xcode, Jira, Confluence
Professional Experience
Senior React Native Developer / Senior Android Developer
LETSVENTURE TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED | Bengaluru
Sep 2019 - Feb 2026
Domain: Fintech | SaaS | Startup Ecosystem  |  Products: LVX, LVXQ, Scalix
  • Led end-to-end development of investor-focused fintech apps across Android and iOS, handling 60+ successful production releases.
  • Architected scalable features using React Native, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, React Query, and GraphQL.
  • Integrated secure authentication (AWS Cognito, Auth0) and payment gateways (Razorpay, Cashfree) for secure transactions.
  • Implemented deep linking, push notifications, and analytics (Branch, Firebase, PostHog, Sentry), alongside custom native module integrations (camera, location, device APIs).
  • Drove architecture discussions, code reviews, and performance optimizations within an Agile environment, collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure timely delivery of critical product initiatives.
Software Engineer (Android Developer)
WILDTRAILS TECHNOLOGY PRIVATE LIMITED | Bengaluru
Mar 2018 - Sep 2019
  • Developed Android application features for wildlife exploration and safari planning platforms.
  • Integrated REST APIs and optimized application performance for low-bandwidth environments.
  • Improved application responsiveness, stability, and user experience.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver product enhancements.
Junior Android Developer
DUNST TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED | Bengaluru
Dec 2017 - Mar 2018
Projects: Wanderlust, SIFF
  • Developed Android application features for travel and event-management platforms.
  • Implemented notifications, multimedia content delivery, scheduling, and ticketing workflows.
  • Integrated REST APIs and optimized application performance.
  • Supported maintenance and feature enhancement activities.
Junior R&D Engineer (Android Developer)
PLUREBUS TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED | Bengaluru
Sep 2016 - Sep 2017
Project: Entertainment Discovery & Booking Platform
  • Developed Android application features for entertainment discovery and booking platforms similar to BookMyShow.
  • Implemented event discovery, search, booking workflows, and multimedia content features.
  • Integrated REST APIs and customer booking functionalities.
  • Collaborated with backend and product teams to improve scalability and performance.

Technologies: React Native, TypeScript, GraphQL, Redux Toolkit, React Query, AWS Cognito, Auth0, Razorpay, Cashfree, PostHog, Sentry, Firebase
